title: Sajeela Kershi Rebel Without Applause Wip
description: Multi-award Winning Sassy Doyenne of Rebels and comedian/writer/broadcaster Sajeela Kershi, returns to the Brighton Fringe after a long hiatus with her hilarious new show about our inner Rebel! Which picks up where her last Brighton Fringe, critically acclaimed show 'Fights Like A girl' left off. Whether you're a Rebel with/without a cause, pause or menopause. It's time for ALL the Rebels from Gen X,Y and Zee to unite! Are you ready? Good! Start by getting to the show on time, 4.15pm - this show is ticketed but FREE to attend, donations on exit! Winner AWA (Asian Woman of Achievement) Argus Angel (Artistic Excellence) Star of Edinburgh Award for best show (Seen/heard/written for various TV/Radio (BBC, C4, ITV, Comedy Central TalkTV & more) 'Smart, funny with a mischievous glint' (Times) 'Hugely talented, extremely funny divine diva' (Time Out) 'Should be made available on prescription' (Skinny)
